_description: Retroactive micro-failure accumulation from Sol 1 for System Dependency Graph physics. Based on Apollo 13 precursor events: small failures build up toward major cascades.
_data_sources: Apollo 13 Detailed Chronology of Events Surrounding the Accident (NASA)
ISS ECLSS failure mode and effects analysis (FMEA) database
Space station environmental control system dependency documentation
NASA Marshall ECLSS system integration studies

retroactive_range.description: Add cumulative micro-failure stress to all previous sols

physics_model.description: Real space systems don't fail suddenly - small failures accumulate over time until they cascade into major system failures. Apollo 13 had multiple precursor events before the oxygen tank explosion.
physics_model.accumulation_rate: 0.001 stress units per sol base rate + equipment age factor
physics_model.threshold: 1.0 stress units triggers major cascade failure
physics_model.reset_condition: Stress resets to 0 after major cascade event

stress_sources: Thermal cycling stress (Mars daily temperature swings)

sol_100.explanation: 100 sols of thermal cycling + equipment aging = 12% stress accumulation

sol_500.explanation: 500 sols shows significant stress buildup approaching cascade threshold

sol_800.explanation: By Sol 800, system is near critical failure point (90% of threshold)

sol_900.explanation: Stress reset after Sol 875 cascade event, building up again

cascade_triggers.description: When enriched micro-failure stress reaches 1.0, a major cascade is triggered
cascade_triggers.severity_correlation: Higher accumulated stress = more severe cascade (0.3-0.9 severity range)

apollo_13_correlation.description: Apollo 13's oxygen tank explosion was preceded by months of micro-failures
precursor_events: Oxygen tank #2 quantity sensor anomalies (months before)
Electrical short in tank heater element (ground testing)
apollo_13_correlation.lesson: No single failure caused Apollo 13 - it was accumulation of small problems that cascaded when triggered by routine tank stir operation

enrichment_implementation.description: Gauntlet retroactively applies this stress to all sols 1-977
enrichment_implementation.when_applied: Every time gauntlet runs v10+ frames
enrichment_implementation.cannot_opt_out: This enrichment is mandatory - represents real physics
enrichment_implementation.breaks_old_strategies: Strategies that worked in v9 may fail in v10 due to cascade accumulation from early mission phases
